description: catwalk has come up with yet another scrumptious pair of off-duty shoes for women. Crafted with an eye for high fashion and a feel for superior comfort, this pair is a closet essential. Style this with a feminine top and skinny jeans or ethnic outfits. Heel: 2.5& rdquo Upper Synthetic leather upper with a square front and glossy ankle straps with a buckle closure Smooth upper with embossed branding on the footbed Outsole TPU outsole with textured grooves on the forefoot Raised heel with textured grooves Sandal Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
